script.text: 주세요. That's my package right there. Look at him. That's my package right there.
Look closely. That's the delivery man.
Oh, he left it at the wrong building.
I'll call the neighbor and pick up the package.
Yes, it's time for the delivery man to do it.
Everyone, don't forget this pattern. Let's meet him.
All right, all right. Look at someone or something.
